title: 'Achiyno`am #0293
definition:
Ahinoam = "my brother is delight"

 1) wife of Saul, daughter of Ahimaaz
 2) wife of David, mother of Amnon, a Jezreelitess
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahinoam = "my brother is delight"

 1) wife of Saul, daughter of Ahimaaz
 2) wife of David, mother of Amnon, a Jezreelitess

    NASB:  my brother is delight, two Isr. women
